jobs.name: daily-openclaw-self-update

payload.message: Use the openclaw-self-update skill to check the installed OpenClaw version, compare it with the latest published version, upgrade if newer, verify the result, and report the before/after version plus any restart that was needed. Do not ask for approval; the update is already authorized.

jobs.description: Daily OpenClaw self-update job using the openclaw-self-update skill.

payload.text: Hourly heartbeat: Check on the Hermes agent's long-running task. Check if it is stuck, and if it's down, fix the issue and make it resume the work.
